items.client_truth: Only Anthem/CareFirst BCBS is in-network. Other carriers are handled through out-of-network superbills.
items.campaign_action: Replace broad insurance claims with client-approved language.
items.suggested_copy: In-network with Anthem BCBS. Superbills provided for out-of-network benefits.
items.engine_rule_update: Insurance claims must use exact client-approved payer language.

items.client_truth: No current clinician openings for EMDR.
items.campaign_action: Remove EMDR from active copy, active keywords, and roadmap.
items.engine_rule_update: Website service presence is not enough. Active ad copy requires current capacity.

items.client_truth: ADHD testing is available through age 21 only.
items.campaign_action: Reposition as ADHD Testing for Children, Teens, and Young Adults. Add adult-intent negatives.
items.engine_rule_update: Age eligibility must drive keyword generation, copy generation, and negative keyword generation.

items.topic: Parent-child services versus standalone family therapy
items.client_truth: Parent-child therapy and family support are available around an identified child patient. Standalone family therapy is not offered.
items.campaign_action: Replace family therapy language with parent-child therapy or family support language. Add family therapy negatives.
items.engine_rule_update: Adjacent modality terms require standalone-service verification.

items.client_truth: Psychiatric NP referrals are the highest growth priority. Target is 15 to 20 referrals per week.
items.recommended_action: Consider a psychiatry-focused campaign split and heavier budget weighting instead of simply adding more ad groups.
items.strategy_question: Should psychiatry launch as its own highest-priority campaign on day 1?

items.client_truth: Client wants to discuss launching brand campaign immediately with modest monthly budget.
items.recommended_action: Approve if budget is capped and brand reporting stays separate from nonbrand.

items.topic: Bidding, geo modifiers, and conversion tracking
items.client_truth: Client needs clarity on bid strategy, geo modifiers, conversion tracking, PHI handling, GA4, and Curve Compliance.
items.recommended_action: Prepare launch-readiness explanation and verify no PHI is passed to Google measurement systems.
items.engine_rule_update: Bidding strategy explanations must state whether manual bid modifiers materially affect the selected strategy.

items.client_truth: Client believes Maryland should likely be excluded due to CPA, logistics, and telehealth limits.
items.recommended_action: Do not use old CPA alone as the proof. Decide based on licensing, telehealth, commute friction, landing page support, and budget test appetite.
items.strategy_question: Exclude Maryland now, or isolate it into a capped separate test with a Maryland-specific page?

items.client_truth: Legal entity name will change in the next month or two and may affect healthcare advertiser verification.
items.recommended_action: Coordinate verification timing before launch and avoid unnecessary mid-flight verification changes.
